chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-551 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.2492/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Ameeruddin, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Mubarak Ali, Advocate for Respondent No.2 (K.D.A) Present petition assails a letter dated 26.12.2022, available at page-97 is reads as follows:- “No.DM/PHS/KDA/2022/1009 Dated 26.12.2022 Mr. Mazhar-ul-Haq, (Seller/Attorney of Muhammad Irfan Ali) S/o (Late) Abdul Aziz, R/o House No. A-14/115, Al-Gohar, Unit No.3, Latifabad, Hyderabad Mr. Khurram Nabi, (Purchaser) S/o Noorun Nabi, R/o Bungalow No. N-10, KD Overseas Bungalows, Gulistan-e-Jauhar, Block-16-A, Karachi Subject:- SUSPENSION OF TRANSFER ORDER OF KDA OVERSEASE BUNGALOW NO. N-10, BLOCK-16-A, SCHEME-36, GULISTAN-E-JAUHAR, KARACHI With reference to this office letter nos. 985, & 991, dt:15.12.2022 & dt:20.12.2022 respectively, issued to you for settlement / resolution of the disputed matter with the complainant as per given time (3-days positively), but you have failed to settle the disputed matter in this regard so far. The Transfer Order bearing No.357, dated:06.07.2020 of above subject bungalow have been suspended today on 26.12.2022 till the Court decision of Suit No. 1357/2016. Sd/-26/12/2022 Assistant Director Marketing, PHS, KDA Copy for information to:- 1. Director Marketing, PHS, KDA 2. P.S. TO Director ACE/Enquiries, Govt. of Sindh, Karachi 3.

P.S. TO Director ACE/Enquiries, Govt. of Sindh, Karachi 3. P.S. to D.G., KDA 4. Office copy.” While the petitioner remained at liberty to approach the relevant Court in the relevant legal proceedings. No case is made out for direct recourse in writ jurisdiction. This petition found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
